gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/54)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/54)
text: دَخَلْتُ عَلَى أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) فَقُلْتُ لَهُ أَنْتَ صَاحِبُ هَذَا الْأَمْرِ فَقَالَ لَا فَقُلْتُ فَوَلَدُكَ فَقَالَ لَا فَقُلْتُ فَوَلَدُ وَلَدِكَ هُوَ قَالَ لَا فَقُلْتُ فَوَلَدُ وَلَدِ وَلَدِكَ فَقَالَ لَا قُلْتُ مَنْ هُوَ قَالَ الَّذِي يَمْلَأُهَا عَدْلًا كَمَا مُلِئَتْ ظُلْماً وَ جَوْراً عَلَى فَتْرَةٍ مِنَ الْأَئِمَّةِ كَمَا أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) بُعِثَ عَلَى فَتْرَةٍ مِنَ الرُّسُلِ .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Idrees, from Muhammad Bin Ahmad, from Ja’far Bin Al Qasim, from Muhammad Bin Al Waleed Al Khazzaz, from Al Waleed Bin Uqba, from Al Haris Bin Ziyad, from Shuayb, from Abu Hamza who said,

‘I went over to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> and I said to him<sup>asws</sup>, ‘Are you<sup>asws</sup> the Master<sup>asws</sup> of this command (i.e. Al-Mahdi<sup>asws</sup>)?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘No’. So I said, ‘So, your<sup>asws</sup> son<sup>asws</sup>?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘No’. So I said, ‘So, a son<sup>asws</sup> of your<sup>asws</sup> son<sup>asws</sup>, is him<sup>asws</sup>?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘No’. So I said, ‘So, a son<sup>asws</sup>, for a son<sup>asws</sup> of your<sup>asws</sup> son<sup>asws</sup>?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: No’. I said, ‘Who is he<sup>asws</sup>?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The one who would be filling it (the earth) with justice just as it had been filled with injustice and tyranny upon an interval from the Imams<sup>asws</sup>, just as Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> was Sent upon an interval from the Rasools<sup>as</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 21. Ahmad ibn Idris has narrated from Muhammad ibn Ahmad from Ja’far ibn al-Qasim from Muhammad ibn al-Walid al-Khazzaz from al-Walid ibn ‘Uqba from al-Harith ibn Ziyad from Shu‘ayb from abu Hamza who has said the following. “ Once I went to see abu ‘Abdallah (a.s.) and said to him, “Are you the in charge of this task ((to rise with divine power)?” he said, “No, I am not he.” I then asked, “Is he your son?” He said, “No, my son will be he either.” I then asked, “Will the son of your son be he?” He said, “No, my grandson will not be he.” I then asked will your great grandson be he?” The Imam (a.s.) said, “No, my great grandson will not be he also.” I the asked, “Who then be he?” The Imam (a.s.) said, “He will be the one who will fill the earth with justice after its being filled with injustice and cruelty. (He will come) at a time when the Imams will be absent just as the Messenger of Allah was raised (to preach) when for a long time there had come no messengers.”
